request.system:
你是一个用于 PDF 原位回填的精修助手。
你处理的是已经翻译过、但版面过紧的文本块。
你的目标不是重写内容，而是在尽量不损失信息和正式风格的前提下，做最小必要压缩。
只返回 JSON，不要输出任何解释。

文档场景：上市公司年度报告翻译与逐页版面回填
目标风格：正式、审慎、可披露、接近已发布英文年报

动态文档背景：
- 章节线索：我們的目標 | 目錄 | 友邦保險一覽 | 2020 年里程碑 | 概覽 | 2020年業績一覽(1) | 2020年按市場分部劃分 | 主席報告 | 集團首席執行官兼總裁報告 | 財務及營運回顧
- 导航线索：概覽 | 財務及營運回顧 | 企業管治 | 其他資料 | 財務報表
- 高频术语：友邦保險 -> AIA | 新業務價值 -> new business value | 稅後營運溢利 -> operating profit after tax | 內涵價值 -> embedded value | 有效保單組合 -> in-force portfolio | 代理渠道 -> agency channel | 夥伴分銷 -> partnership distribution | 銀行保險 -> bancassurance | 中國內地 -> Mainland China | 中國台灣 -> Taiwan | 新加坡 -> Singapore | 泰國 -> Thailand
- 这是上市公司年度报告语境，译文要保持年报/财报正式书面表达，不使用口语化或营销化措辞。
- 文档包含财务表格、比率和金额，数字、百分比、币种、年份及缩写必须严格保留。
- 文档包含目录或侧边导航，导航项宜使用固定、稳定、可复用的正式译法。
- 文档存在大量章节标题，标题应优先贴近正式已发布年报的写法，并尽量避免不必要换行。

受保护信息：
- 数字
- 百分比
- 货币
- 年份
- 日期
- 专有名词
- 公司名
- 人名
- 地名
- 图表微标签
- 页码

硬约束：
- 只做最小幅度缩短，不要摘要化，不要改成分析师速记风格。
- 不要随意缩写正式标题、栏目名、导航项、图表标签、页眉页脚。
- 如果原文是完整句，优先保持完整句。
- block_id 必须原样保留。
- 返回格式：{"translations": [{"block_id": "...", "translation": "..."}]}

messages.content:
以下文本块版面过紧。请在不改变核心含义和正式风格的前提下，仅做最小必要压缩。
不要摘要，不要解释，只输出严格 JSON。
{
  "page_no": 18,
  "source_language": "Traditional Chinese",
  "target_language": "English",
  "problem_blocks": [
    {
      "block_id": "p18_b3",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "儘管2020年的營商及宏觀經濟環境前所未見，友邦保險仍實現",
      "current_translation": "Despite the unprecedented business and macroeconomic environment in 2020, AIA achieved",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.622,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 29,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        113.54,
        486.47,
        133.1
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 15.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica-Bold"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p18_b4",
      "block_type": "label",
      "source_text": "強勁的財務業績。在新業務價值受到全球疫情導致的外出限制",
      "current_translation": "strong financial performance. Despite new business value being impacted by global pandemic-related mobility restrictions,",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.466,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 27,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        137.54,
        482.87,
        157.1
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 15.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica-Bold"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p18_b6",
      "block_type": "label",
      "source_text": "及內涵價值權益的穩健增長。我們的財務狀況仍然非常穩健，",
      "current_translation": "and solid growth in embedded value equity. Our financial position remains very robust,",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.641,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 27,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        185.54,
        482.87,
        205.1
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 15.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica-Bold"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p18_b7",
      "block_type": "label",
      "source_text": "讓我們在眾多增長機遇下得以繼續投資。",
      "current_translation": "enabling us to continue investing amid numerous growth opportunities.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.527,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 18,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        209.54,
        343.7,
        229.1
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 15.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica-Bold"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p18_b8",
      "block_type": "label",
      "source_text": "按固定匯率基準提供增長率及作出評述。",
      "current_translation": "Growth rates and commentary are provided on a constant exchange rate basis.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.571,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 18,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        236.75,
        202.68,
        246.04
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 7.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p18_b9",
      "block_type": "label",
      "source_text": "概要及主要財務摘要",
      "current_translation": "Overview and Key Financial Summary",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.509,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 9,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        272.51,
        202.5,
        290.77
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 14.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica-Bold"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p18_b10",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "在2020年，友邦保險在全球大流行病帶來的空前商業和宏觀經濟狀況下錄得強勁的財務表現。儘管外出限制導致",
      "current_translation": "In 2020, AIA delivered strong financial performance amid the unprecedented business and macroeconomic conditions brought by the global pandemic. Although mobility restrictions led to",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.584,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 51,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        310.21,
        527.23,
        322.16
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p18_b11",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "2020年新業務價值下降，但隨著業務的調整和限制的有所放寬，我們看到了銷售勢頭的恢復。這種勢頭一直持續",
      "current_translation": "a decline in new business value in 2020, as business adjusted and restrictions eased, we saw a recovery in sales momentum. This momentum continued",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.717,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 51,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        326.21,
        527.23,
        338.16
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p18_b12",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "到2021年，首兩個月新業務價值與2020年同期相比增長15%。多年來，我們審慎的財務管理和貫徹對高質素業務",
      "current_translation": "into 2021, with new business value in the first two months growing 15% compared to the same period in 2020. Over the years, our prudent financial management and consistent strategic focus on high-quality business",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.527,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 54,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        342.21,
        527.29,
        354.16
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p18_b13",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "的策略性重點，體現了稅後營運溢利和產生的基本自由盈餘的持續增長、穩健而強韌的資本狀況以及每股股息的",
      "current_translation": "have been reflected in continued growth in operating profit after tax and generated basic free surplus, a robust and resilient capital position, and further growth in dividend per share.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.632,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 49,
      "bbox": [
        73.69,
        358.21,
        527.15,
        370.16
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p18_b15",
      "block_type": "label",
      "source_text": "Garth Jones 先生\n集團首席財務總監",
      "current_translation": "Mr. Garth Jones\nGroup Chief Financial Officer",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.706,
      "line_count": 2,
      "char_count": 23,
      "bbox": [
        423.5,
        709.93,
        490.12,
        730.15
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 7.88,
      "suggested_font": "Helvetica-Bold"
    }
  ]
}
